message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "WebApp" as WebApp #LightBlue2
database DB #LightBlue3

User ->> WebApp : [POST] / driver {body}
activate WebApp
    WebApp->DB: save driver 
        activate DB  
            return OK   
        deactivate DB    
return 201 CREATED {body} 

deactivate WebApp


User -->+ WebApp :[GET]/driver
    
   WebApp-->- DB:get driver
   
     DB-->> + WebApp:driver object
     
       WebApp -->> - User:200 OK{ body }



@enduml
